root.sql: select ( sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ||' ('||sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no||')' ) as name, ((CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no WHEN null THEN '' ELSE 'เลขที่ '||sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no END) ||(CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.moo WHEN null THEN '' ELSE 'หมู่ '||sc_mem_m_member_address.moo END) ||(CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.road WHEN null THEN '' ELSE ' ถ.'||sc_mem_m_member_address.road END) ||(CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.soi WHEN null THEN '' ELSE ' ซ.'||sc_mem_m_member_address.soi END) ) as address1, ((CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol WHEN null THEN '' ELSE (CASE sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code WHEN '10' THEN 'แขวง' ELSE 'ต.' END)||sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol END) ||(CASE sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name WHEN null THEN '' ELSE (CASE sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code WHEN '10' THEN ' เขต' ELSE ' อ.' END)||sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name END) ||(CASE sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name WHEN null THEN '' ELSE (CASE sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code WHEN '10' THEN ' ' ELSE ' จ.' END)||sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name END) ) as address2, (sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode ) as address3 from sc_mem_m_member_address, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_province, sc_mem_m_ucf_district where 1=1 and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_district.province_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) --and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = '012121' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' /*WHERE*/
